name: Stinky Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate all cheeses into a shallow pan or mixing bowl.
2. Dice the chile pepper and pimentos, then sprinkle over the grated cheese.
3. Press the garlic cloves, adding both juice and pulp to the cheese.
4. Add minced onion and ground pepper.
5. Generously sprinkle powdered garlic over everything.
6. Thoroughly mix together; then add mayonnaise and blend until smooth, adding water as needed.
7. Store in an airtight container for at least 2 days before using.
Make about 8 cups.
